title: Multistage coupling of independent laser-plasma accelerators
authors: S. Steinke, J. van Tilborg, C. Benedetti, et al.
reason: 激光等离子体加速的里程碑实验，证明独立LPA级联可行。
summary: 首次实验证明独立激光等离子体加速级联，为多级高能等离子体加速器奠定基础。

title: Dense GeV electron-positron pairs generated by lasers in near-critical-density plasmas
authors: Xing-Long Zhu, Tong-Pu Yu, Zheng-Ming Sheng, et al.
reason: 强场QED与激光等离子体耦合代表作。
summary: QED-PIC 显示近临界等离子体中可产生高密度GeV正负电子对。

title: Plasma holograms for ultrahigh-intensity optics
authors: A. Leblanc, A. Denoeud, L. Chopineau, et al.
reason: 超强激光等离子体光学的重要进展。
summary: 将等离子体全息用于超高强度光场操控，拓展强场实验平台能力。

title: Single-stage plasma-based correlated energy spread compensation for ultrahigh 6D brightness electron beams
authors: G. G. Manahan, A. F. Habib, P. Scherkl, et al.
reason: 高亮度等离子体加速束流品质控制关键论文。
summary: 单级等离子体方案补偿相关能散，显著提升6D亮度束流可用性。

title: Experimental Signatures of the Quantum Nature of Radiation Reaction in the Field of an Ultraintense Laser
authors: K. Poder, M. Tamburini, G. Sarri, et al.
reason: 强场QED辐射反作用实验里程碑。
summary: 在超强激光场中观测到量子辐射反作用特征，支持量子模型。

title: Near-100 MeV protons via a laser-driven transparency-enhanced hybrid acceleration scheme
authors: A. Higginson, R. J. Gray, M. King, et al.
reason: 激光质子加速高能化关键成果。
summary: 透明增强混合机制实现接近100 MeV质子束，推进激光离子加速。

title: Laser Amplification in Strongly Magnetized Plasma
authors: Matthew R. Edwards, Yuan Shi, Julia M. Mikhailova, Nathaniel J. Fisch
reason: 强磁化等离子体中激光放大机理代表文献。
summary: 提出并验证强磁化等离子体中的激光放大路径，关联HEDP高场应用。

title: Generating keV ion distributions for nuclear reactions at near solid-density using intense short-pulse lasers
authors: A. J. Kemp, S. C. Wilks, E. P. Hartouni, et al.
reason: HEDP与激光核反应方向关键实验/模拟结合。
summary: 强短脉冲激光在近固体密度靶中生成keV离子分布并驱动核反应。

title: Automation and control of laser wakefield accelerators using Bayesian optimization
authors: R. J. Shalloo et al.
reason: 机器学习+plasma代表作。
summary: 贝叶斯优化用于LWFA多参数自动控制，显著改善电子束与X射线输出。

title: Dissipation of electron-beam-driven plasma wakes
authors: Rafal Zgadzaj et al.
reason: PWFA耗散与重复频率极限关键问题。
summary: 结合皮秒诊断与PIC揭示电子束驱动尾场的耗散机制与时间尺度。

title: Demonstration of a compact plasma accelerator powered by laser-accelerated electron beams
authors: T. Kurz et al.
reason: LWFA驱动PWFA混合级联里程碑。
summary: 实现激光加速电子束驱动的紧凑二级等离子体加速，展示高梯度潜力。

title: Probing Strong-Field QED with Doppler-Boosted Petawatt-Class Lasers
authors: Luca Fedeli, Antonin Sainte-Marie, Neil Zaïm, Maxence Thévenet, Jean-Luc Vay, Andrew Myers, Fabien Quéré, Henri Vincenti
reason: 等离子体镜+拍瓦激光进入SFQED参数区。
summary: 通过多普勒增频与聚焦增强探索可观测强场QED效应。

title: Recovery time of a plasma-wakefield accelerator
authors: R. D'Arcy et al.
reason: PWFA高重复率运行可行性关键约束。
summary: 量化尾场激发后的等离子体恢复时间，直接影响未来设施重复频率设计。

title: Homogeneous, Micron-Scale High-Energy-Density Matter Generated by Relativistic Laser-Solid Interactions
authors: N. F. Beier et al.
reason: 激光固体相互作用制备均匀HED态的重要工作。
summary: 相对论激光-固体作用下产生微米尺度均匀高能量密度物质。

title: Positron Generation and Acceleration in a Self-Organized Photon Collider Enabled by an Ultraintense Laser Pulse
authors: K. Sugimoto, Y. He, N. Iwata, I.-L. Yeh, K. Tangtartharakul, A. Arefiev, Y. Sentoku
reason: 近临界等离子体中QED正电子产生与加速。
summary: 自组织光子对撞机制下实现正电子产生和加速，体现QED-plasma耦合。

title: Ultra-short pulse laser acceleration of protons to 80 MeV from cryogenic hydrogen jets tailored to near-critical density
authors: Martin Rehwald, Stefan Assenbaum, Constantin Bernert, Florian-Emanuel Brack, et al.
reason: 近临界低温氢喷流激光质子加速代表。
summary: 在近临界低温氢喷流上实现80 MeV级激光质子加速。

title: Plasma electron acceleration driven by a long-wave-infrared laser
authors: R. Zgadzaj, J. Welch, Y. Cao, L. D. Amorim, et al.
reason: 长波红外驱动LWFA开辟新参数区。
summary: CO2长波激光成功驱动等离子体电子加速，展示低密度尾场新方案。

title: Laser-Driven Proton-Only Acceleration in a Multicomponent Near-Critical-Density Plasma
authors: Y. Sakawa, H. Ishihara, S. N. Ryazantsev, M. A. Alkhimova, et al.
reason: 近临界多组分等离子体中的质子加速机制关键研究。
summary: 实验与PIC表明近临界多组分等离子体可实现高纯度激光质子加速。

title: Plasma-wakefield accelerator simultaneously boosts electron beam energy and brightness
authors: Chaojie Zhang, Douglas Storey, Alexander Knetsch, Brendan D. O’Shea, et al.
reason: PWFA能量与亮度双提升里程碑。
summary: 米级PWFA同步提升电子束能量与亮度，推动应用型紧凑加速器。

title: Laser-driven proton acceleration beyond 100 MeV by radiation pressure and Coulomb repulsion in a conduction-restricted plasma
authors: Yinren Shou, Xuezhi Wu, Ki Hong Pae, Gwang-Eun Ahn, et al.
reason: >100 MeV 激光质子加速关键成果。
summary: 辐射压与库仑排斥协同机制实现超过100 MeV质子加速。

title: Observation of quantum effects on radiation reaction in strong fields
authors: Eva E. Los, Elias Gerstmayr, Christopher Arran, Matthew J. V. Streeter, et al.
reason: 强场QED量子辐射反作用高显著性观测。
summary: 实验上高置信度验证强场辐射反作用中的量子修正效应。

title: Bright electron bunches from a plasma-wakefield accelerator with a steep density down-ramp
authors: J. C. Wood, L. Boulton, J. Beinortaitė, J. Björklund Svensson, et al.
reason: PWFA下坡密度注入高亮度束流代表进展。
summary: 陡峭下坡密度注入实现高重复、低发射度、亮束团输出。
